API key setup, Claude pipeline, standalone cleanup, error handling, prompt editor all untested

decisions.decision: Wrapped TranscriptionPanel in its own frame to fix banner overlap
decisions.rationale: Panel was gridding at row=0 in content_frame, overwriting the banner widget

decisions.decision: Changed SettingsDialog to accept on_language_changed callback
decisions.rationale: Dialog was checking hasattr on ttk.Window (not MainWindow), so language callback never fired

decisions.decision: Removed lang parameter from create_app() call in main.py
decisions.rationale: app.py was refactored to read language from SettingsStore internally, but main.py still passed the arg

next_action: Commit the 3 bug fixes (main.py, main_window.py, settings_dialog.py), then re-test all 7 test groups starting from Test 1 (banner visibility)
context_notes: Phase 3 execution: Waves 1-2 complete (plans 03-01 through 03-03). Currently in Wave 3 (plan 03-04 human verification checkpoint). User found 2 bugs during testing: (1) API key banner not showing — TranscriptionPanel overwrote banner's grid row, (2) language switch not live-reloading — SettingsDialog callback targeted ttk.Window instead of MainWindow. Both fixed in working tree but not committed. Tests 3-7 still need to be run (API key, Claude pipeline, standalone cleanup, error handling, prompt editor). Also need to install platformdirs/keyring/anthropic in venv — done this session.
